note: 문제 분해+논리적 쿼리로 in-the-wild 코퍼스 검색. Step-by-Step.

title: RAR2: Retrieval-Augmented Medical Reasoning via Thought-Driven Retrieval
eval_task: MedQA, MedMCQA, MMLU-Med, GPQA, Medbullets, MedXpertQA
note: Thought 검색+검색 추론 동시 DPO. Test-time scaling.

title: Rag2Mol: structure-based drug design based on RAG
eval_metric: Vina, QED, SA, PB-Valid, CNN affinity
note: ★ K2.O3. Cross-KNN graph fusion. PTPN2 undruggable target case validated.

title: Rationale-Guided Retrieval Augmented Generation for Medical Question Answering

title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation Assistant for Anatomical Pathology Laboratories
note: K4 NOVELTY EXAMPLE — internal lab protocols as retrieval source. k=1 best F1=0.50. Hybrid + MedEmbed best on RAGAS.

title: Retrieval-augmented generation for generative AI in health care
note: Perspective paper on RAG in healthcare: equity, reliability, personalization. Type=summary.

title: SQuAI: Scientific Question-Answering with Multi-Agent Retrieval-Augmented Generation

title: SciRag: Evaluating RAG Agents for Autonomous Scientific Discovery in Astrophysics

title: Seeing the Forest Through the Trees: Knowledge Retrieval for Streamlining Particle Physics Analysis

post_retrieval_detail: Top-20→Top-10 MedCPT 리랭킹. KG 1-hop 관계 Top-10 후 하위 절반 필터
eval_task: MedQA, MedMCQA, MMLU-Med, PubMedQA, BioASQ, SEER, DDXPlus, MIMIC-IV-ED, LiveQA, MedicationQA, ExpertQA-Biomed
note: 5개 다중 구조 의료 KB(MedOmniKB) 구축 + SPO 기법. 소형 Planner가 10배 큰 모델 능가.

title: WeQA: Wind Energy Question Answering
note: WeQA Wind Energy (2025, Earth).
